label: 第175話
source_locator: 単行本20巻 目次 p.67
summary_short: 乙骨は黒沐死の大量の式神と呪具「爛生刀」に苦戦する。反転術式を隠そうとするが、口から正のエネルギーを流し込んで黒沐死を倒す。
summary_full: 乙骨は一般人を守るリカを呼び戻さず、反転術式も他の泳者へ隠したまま黒沐死と戦おうとする。黒沐死は蜚蠊の群れと爛生刀で攻め、刀に斬られた乙骨の肩から異形の虫を発生させる。追い詰められた乙骨は秘匿を諦め、黒沐死の口へ接触して反転術式の正のエネルギーを直接流し込み、呪霊を祓う。その直後、乙骨の反転術式を見抜いた烏鷺亨子が背後から攻撃する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 乙骨憂太 's next 死滅回游 opponent is the special grade cockroach curse : 黒沐死 ! Aware at least two other strong players are observing the battle to see how things play out, 憂太 wants to win without revealing too much about his powers.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 憂太 tries to exorcise 黒沐死 without 里香 or 反転術式. Armed with the 爛生刀 , 黒沐死 ferociously attacks only to have its arm is immediately cut off by 憂太. The sorcerer then uses his katana to pin the curse's severed arm to a rock, literally disarming it. 憂太 follows up with a powerful backhand strike that sends 黒沐死 skidding across the water on their battlefield. The cockroach curse tries to fly up above a bridge above the water but 憂太 jumps on top of the bridge and rips off a railing to use as a projectile. 憂太 hits 黒沐死 with the severed railing and then tries to capitalize with a diving slash. 黒沐死 is sent crashing into the water below, but the curse managed to stop 憂太's blade using a swarm of cockroaches. 憂太 swipes the swarm away with his sword while 黒沐死 manipulates it into a twister of cockroaches to stand on. 憂太 is aware that he's being watched by two players with high scores. He can exorcise 黒沐死 by driving positive energy into its body in a similar fashion to how he revived 悠仁 in their fight . However, 憂太 doesn't want the observing players to see that he can use 反転術式 . Additionally, he can't call on 里香 because it's protecting everyone at the stadium. 黒沐死 is a dangerous opponent, but 憂太 wants to exorcise it without relying on 反転術式 or 里香. 憂太 cursed by 黒沐死's 爛生刀. 黒沐死 speaks and asks 憂太 why he's interfering with its feeding. 憂太 responds by asking the curse why it kills people and Kurourshi simply replies that it likes the taste of iron. 黒沐死 uses its Earthen Insect Trance technique to summon small insect-like curses that carry small sacks. The swarm of cockroaches circle around 憂太, forcing him to stab the shallow water to create a shockwave. When the swarm dissipates, the curses from Earthen Insect Trace attack 憂太 from behind. 憂太 slashes them apart but toxins from their sacks blind him for a moment, giving Kurorusuhi an opening. 黒沐死 attempts to devour 憂太. The cockroach curse retrieves the 爛生刀 and slashes at its target. 憂太 blocks it with his katana but the Festing Life Sword shoots something into his shoulder. He figured the cursed tool might be able to shoot projectiles and retreats back to gain some distance, but more insect-like curses suddenly grow out of his shoulder wound. Taken by surprise, 憂太 tries to cut them off with his katana but this gives 黒沐死 another opening to attack. The cockroach curse slashes Yutas across his abdomen, opening another wound with more curses spawning out of it. 憂太 uses a mouth-to-mouth blast of positive energy as a last resort. 石流龍 and 烏鷺亨子 watch in shock as 黒沐死 grabs 憂太's body with several arms, fully expecting it to devour 憂太. Suddenly, 憂太 bites 黒沐死's face and drives positive energy into it, comprising integrity of its entire body. 黒沐死's mouth was the shortest distance from 憂太's hands, so he delivered a mouth-to-mouth blast to the curse's head by converting 反転術式 into output. 龍 takes note of all of this but says he would never do that himself. 黒沐死 falls to pieces while 憂太 spits its remains out of his mouth, earning five points from コガネ for eliminating his opponent. "Seems like you can use 反転術式." With the 呪霊 out of the way and 憂太 in a vulnerable state, 烏鷺 decides to take advantage and confronts him directly. Levitating upside down behind her rival, 烏鷺 talks into 憂太's ear and takes him by surprise. 烏鷺 tells him that she can see he can use 反転術式 and 憂太 tries to quickly turn around to face her. Before 憂太 can confront the danger directly, 烏鷺 uses their 術式 to heavily distort the space around them.

key_events_verified_phase9: 乙骨がリカを市民の護衛へ残して黒沐死と戦う
爛生刀の効果で乙骨の体内から虫が発生する
乙骨が正のエネルギーを外部出力して黒沐死を祓う
烏鷺が乙骨へ奇襲する
verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
